name: python3-tzlocal
title: python3-tzlocal
summary: tzinfo object for the local timezone
description:
tzinfo object for the local timezone
This Python module returns a tzinfo object with the local timezone
information.
.
Example of usage:
.
>>> from tzlocal import get_localzone
>>> tz = get_localzone()
>>> tz
<DstTzInfo 'Europe/Warsaw' WMT+1:24:00 STD>
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-tzlocal because tzinfo object for the local timezone.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-tzlocal as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-tzlocal with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-tzlocal --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
